title: Spectacular European nights the new normal for Villa under Emery
summary: Aston Villa has transformed from second-tier relegation a decade ago to reaching their second European semifinal in three seasons. The club's remarkable rise reflects Unai Emery's impact since taking charge.
content: Ten years ago, Aston Villa were relegated to English football's second tier for the first time since 1987. Now they are in their second European semi-final in three seasons.

title: Why 'sensational' Palace & Conference League are good fit
summary: Crystal Palace advanced to the Conference League semifinals after eliminating Fiorentina and can pursue a European trophy to add to last season's FA Cup victory. The club is positioned for an impressive achievement.
content: After overcoming Fiorentina over two legs to reach the semi-finals, Crystal Palace will now fancy their chances of going all the way in the Conference League and adding a European trophy to their FA Cup success last season.

title: 'Joke': Madrid fume at costly red card in UCL exit

title: Messi hit with $7M lawsuit over missed friendly

content: A Miami-based event promoter has filed a $7 million lawsuit against Lionel Messi and the Argentine Football Association, alleging fraud and breach of contract after the star sat out an exhibition match last October.

title: Arteta wanted fire but Arsenal limp to semis - does style matter?
